{"model":"claude-sonnet-4-6","max_tokens":128000,"output_config":{"format":{"type":"json_schema","schema":{"$schema":"http://json-schema.org/draft-07/schema#","type":"object","properties":{"anchors":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"object","properties":{"query":{"type":"string","description":"min length: 1."},"why":{"type":"string","description":"min length: 1."}},"additionalProperties":false,"required":["query","why"]},"description":"min items: 1."},"confidence":{"enum":["high","medium","low"],"type":"string"},"roadChain":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"string","description":"min length: 1."}}},"additionalProperties":false,"required":["anchors","confidence","roadChain"]}}},"messages":[{"role":"user","content":[{"type":"text","text":"You reconstruct motorcycle route geometry from ride descriptions.

ROUTE: "Repair Round Test" in California
CLAIMED LENGTH: 100 miles
APPROX CENTER: lat 34.6, lng -119.3
DESCRIPTION:
Highway 33 out-and-back over Pine Mountain
Start in Ojai, CA and ride north on Highway 33 through Wheeler Gorge. Continue past the Rose Valley turnoff and climb over Pine Mountain Summit. Drop down through the Cuyama badlands to Ventucopa, CA. Turn around and retrace the same road back to Ojai.

Extract an ORDERED list of geocodable anchor points tracing this exact route, start to end.
Rules:
- Use road-intersection queries ("Redwood Rd & Pinehurst Rd, Castro Valley, CA") or "place, city, state" queries a geocoder can resolve.
- One anchor at the start, one at each described turn/junction (so the router is forced onto the described roads), one at the end.
- Always append city/region + state abbreviation to every query.
- If the description says a road "turns into" another, add the transition point as an anchor.
- For loops, the last anchor must return to the first.
- Only use points the description supports. Do not invent scenic detours."}]}]}
exchanges.responseBody: {"model":"claude-sonnet-4-6","id":"msg_011Cd5FVCa857gnFS6cVrTnF","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"text","text":"{\"anchors\":[{\"query\":\"Ojai, CA\",\"why\":\"Described start point of the route\"},{\"query\":\"Highway 33 & Wheeler Gorge, Ventura County, CA\",\"why\":\"First named landmark heading north on Hwy 33 from Ojai\"},{\"query\":\"Rose Valley Road & Highway 33, Ventura County, CA\",\"why\":\"Described junction at Rose Valley turnoff on Hwy 33\"},{\"query\":\"Pine Mountain Summit, Highway 33, Ventura County, CA\",\"why\":\"Described summit crossing over Pine Mountain\"},{\"query\":\"Cuyama Badlands, Santa Barbara County, CA\",\"why\":\"Described terrain section dropping down from Pine Mountain\"},{\"query\":\"Ventucopa, CA\",\"why\":\"Described turnaround point at the end of the northbound leg\"},{\"query\":\"Pine Mountain Summit, Highway 33, Ventura County, CA\",\"why\":\"Retracing route back over Pine Mountain Summit southbound\"},{\"query\":\"Rose Valley Road & Highway 33, Ventura County, CA\",\"why\":\"Retracing past Rose Valley junction southbound\"},{\"query\":\"Highway 33 & Wheeler Gorge, Ventura County, CA\",\"why\":\"Retracing through Wheeler Gorge southbound\"},{\"query\":\"Ojai, CA\",\"why\":\"Described end point returning to start via same road\"}],\"confidence\":\"high\",\"roadChain\":[\"CA-33 N\",\"CA-33 S\"]}"}],"stop_reason":"end_turn","stop_sequence":null,"stop_details":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":695,"cache_creation_input_tokens":0,"cache_read_input_tokens":0,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":0},"output_tokens":329,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"global"}}

{"model":"claude-sonnet-4-6","max_tokens":128000,"output_config":{"format":{"type":"json_schema","schema":{"$schema":"http://json-schema.org/draft-07/schema#","type":"object","properties":{"anchors":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"object","properties":{"query":{"type":"string","description":"min length: 1."},"why":{"type":"string","description":"min length: 1."}},"additionalProperties":false,"required":["query","why"]},"description":"min items: 1."},"confidence":{"enum":["high","medium","low"],"type":"string"},"roadChain":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"string","description":"min length: 1."}}},"additionalProperties":false,"required":["anchors","confidence","roadChain"]}}},"messages":[{"role":"user","content":[{"type":"text","text":"You reconstruct motorcycle route geometry from ride descriptions.

ROUTE: "Repair Round Test" in California
CLAIMED LENGTH: 100 miles
APPROX CENTER: lat 34.6, lng -119.3
DESCRIPTION:
Highway 33 out-and-back over Pine Mountain
Start in Ojai, CA and ride north on Highway 33 through Wheeler Gorge. Continue past the Rose Valley turnoff and climb over Pine Mountain Summit. Drop down through the Cuyama badlands to Ventucopa, CA. Turn around and retrace the same road back to Ojai.

Extract an ORDERED list of geocodable anchor points tracing this exact route, start to end.
Rules:
- Use road-intersection queries ("Redwood Rd & Pinehurst Rd, Castro Valley, CA") or "place, city, state" queries a geocoder can resolve.
- One anchor at the start, one at each described turn/junction (so the router is forced onto the described roads), one at the end.
- Always append city/region + state abbreviation to every query.
- If the description says a road "turns into" another, add the transition point as an anchor.
- For loops, the last anchor must return to the first.
- Only use points the description supports. Do not invent scenic detours.

PREVIOUS ATTEMPT FAILED VALIDATION — fix it:
Routed length came out 297.4 miles but the ride is claimed to be 100 miles.
Geocoding results were:
OK: Ojai, CA
OK: Highway 33 & Wheeler Gorge, Ventura County, CA
OK: Rose Valley Road & Highway 33, Ventura County, CA
OK: Pine Mountain Summit, Highway 33, Ventura County, CA
OK: Cuyama Badlands, Santa Barbara County, CA
OK: Ventucopa, CA
OK: Pine Mountain Summit, Highway 33, Ventura County, CA
OK: Rose Valley Road & Highway 33, Ventura County, CA
OK: Highway 33 & Wheeler Gorge, Ventura County, CA
OK: Ojai, CA
Diagnose which anchors are wrong (bad geocode, wrong place, causes detour/backtrack) and emit a corrected anchor list. Prefer plain road-intersection queries over business/POI names. Drop anchors that add ambiguity."}]}]}
exchanges.responseBody: {"model":"claude-sonnet-4-6","id":"msg_011Cd5FVkSHMzrLfRsk8T8eL","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"text","text":"{\"anchors\":[{\"query\":\"Ojai, CA\",\"why\":\"Start of route in Ojai\"},{\"query\":\"Highway 33 & Wheeler Gorge Road, Ventura County, CA\",\"why\":\"First named landmark northbound on Hwy 33 through Wheeler Gorge\"},{\"query\":\"Rose Valley Road & Highway 33, Ventura County, CA\",\"why\":\"Junction where Rose Valley turnoff is mentioned, keep router on Hwy 33\"},{\"query\":\"Pine Mountain Summit, Ventura County, CA\",\"why\":\"Summit crossing before dropping into Cuyama badlands\"},{\"query\":\"Ventucopa, CA\",\"why\":\"Turnaround point at end of northbound leg\"},{\"query\":\"Pine Mountain Summit, Ventura County, CA\",\"why\":\"Retracing back over summit southbound\"},{\"query\":\"Rose Valley Road & Highway 33, Ventura County, CA\",\"why\":\"Southbound pass through same junction\"},{\"query\":\"Ojai, CA\",\"why\":\"End of out-and-back, return to start\"}],\"confidence\":\"medium\",\"roadChain\":[\"CA-33 N\",\"CA-33 N\",\"CA-33 N\",\"CA-33 S\",\"CA-33 S\",\"CA-33 S\"]}"}],"stop_reason":"end_turn","stop_sequence":null,"stop_details":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":942,"cache_creation_input_tokens":0,"cache_read_input_tokens":0,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":0},"output_tokens":283,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"global"}}
